creator: brueffer@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hi Aldis, pluknet is right.  When you read the whole sentence 
it becomes clear that (1) and (2) refer to the two licenses 
less can be distributed under. 
Although one could argue that it almost looks like a manpage 
reference, I think the difference is sufficiently clear when 
taking the context into account. 

Nontheless thanks for the report!
